eas_text: A civil authority has issued A HAZARDOUS MATERIALS WARNING for the following counties or areas: Stark, ND; at 8:19 PM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 9:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Stark DES: A NATURAL GAS LEAK has occurred at 1st ave SE. FOLLOW evacuation orders, evacuate to DSU SCOTTS GYM NOW. Stark DES: A NATURAL GAS LEAK has occurred at 1st ave SE. FOLLOW evacuation orders, evacuate to DSU SCOTTS GYM NOW.
